name: claude-hooks-gate-framework
tags: gates, PreToolUse, gate check, deny, allow, anti-hallucination, Gate ABC, prereq decorator, GATES registry, GateContext, add gate
body: Gate framework: Gate subclasses in hooks/gates.py, dispatched from GateCheckNode via gates.check(tool_name, ctx). verify() returns (deny, reason). Adding a gate: subclass Gate, set tool_name, implement verify() or use @prereq(tool, window_s, name_arg) decorator, register in GATES dict. GateContext carries prompt_tools, session_tools, prompt_text, and helpers ctx.called_recently(tool, window_s). Fail-open by default; add tool to _FAIL_CLOSED_TOOLS in dispatcher.py for irreversible tools.
